1477030.name: Fruit Hoop 2
1477030.description:
🍌 The fruit are falling again... and they’re not alone.

Congratulations. You survived the fruitpocalypse. But now they’re back. And this time… they brought friends.

Fruit Hoop 2 is the mind-meltingly ridiculous sequel to the indie classic Fruit Hoop. You once again take control of a hoop—yes, just a hoop—on an eternal mission to catch falling produce and dodge anything that wants you dead. But now, there are more fruits. More hazards. More bananas. So many bananas.

🍊 How to Play

  • Move your hoop.

  • Catch the good stuff.

  • Avoid the bad stuff.

  • Repeat until your hands hurt or your brain melts.
    (Or both.)

🫐 Still Not Convinced?

  • It’s like Frogger had a baby with a blender.

  • Minimal narrative, maximum vibes.

  • Designed for that “one more try” loop that ruins sleep schedules.

  • No microtransactions. Only macrofruit.
1477030.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
